name: KNMI WFS daily climate observations
notes: INSPIRE WFS 2.0 service from KNMI (Koninklijk Nederlands Meteorologisch Instituut). Exposes controlled climatological daily data from 33 automatic weather stations across the Netherlands. Measurements include air temperature, recorded in tenths of degrees Celsius.

dataObjectMappings.name: KNMI daily temperature observations to 000_Source landing
dataObjectMappings.notes: Pulls daily mean air temperature observations from the KNMI INSPIRE WFS endpoint and lands them as parquet under 000_Source/KNMI/daggegevens_temperature.

sourceDataObjects.name: KNMI
sourceDataObjects.notes: KNMI INSPIRE WFS 2.0 endpoint providing PointTimeSeriesObservation features for controlled daily climate observations from automatic weather stations across the Netherlands.

targetDataObject.name: daggegevens_temperature
targetDataObject.notes: Flattened daily mean air temperature observations from KNMI automatic weather stations, one row per (station, date, value) triple.

dataItems.name: station_id
dataItems.notes: GML identifier for the weather station, e.g. PointTimeSeriesObservation_TG_280. The numeric suffix is the KNMI station number; TG indicates daily mean temperature (Temperatuur Gemiddeld).

dataItems.name: observed_property
dataItems.notes: URI identifying the measured property. All rows reference http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/standard_name/air_temperature/, the NERC/CF standard name for air temperature measured at 1.5 m height.

dataItems.name: latitude
dataItems.notes: WGS84 latitude of the weather station (EPSG:4258). Range approximately 50.9 to 55.4, covering the Netherlands from south to north.

dataItems.name: longitude
dataItems.notes: WGS84 longitude of the weather station (EPSG:4258). Range approximately 2.9 to 7.1, covering the Netherlands from west to east.

dataItems.name: period_begin
dataItems.notes: ISO 8601 timestamp marking the start of the full observation period for this station. The earliest stations have records going back to 1881.

dataItems.name: period_end
dataItems.notes: ISO 8601 timestamp marking the end of the observation period for this station, reflecting the dataset's last update on the server.

dataItems.name: timestamp
dataItems.notes: ISO 8601 date of the individual daily measurement, e.g. 1951-09-25T00:00:00Z. Observations are based on a 24-hour period (0:00-24:00 UTC).

dataItems.name: value
dataItems.notes: Daily mean air temperature in tenths of degrees Celsius. For example 134.0 means 13.4 degrees Celsius. Divide by 10 to convert to degrees Celsius. Null indicates a missing measurement.
